authoredShaderContract.colorPath: Geometry Attribute col Color → Emission Color
authoredShaderContract.strengthPath: Geometry Attribute power Vector → Emission Strength
authoredShaderContract.browserResolution: The portable dump retains col and power on all nine evaluated Period Pack children. Collection Info, instancing, realization, and curve-to-mesh propagation carry those fields into one emitted flat.nodes draw group.

capture.toneMapping: NoToneMapping preserves the extracted linear emission palette in the authored evidence capture. This reduces the WebGL-minus-Blender black occupancy delta from +0.0995 under ACES to +0.0103; it does not claim identical Eevee and WebGL color management.

interpretation: The previous black result was an extraction defect: the old portable dump omitted evaluated collection-object attributes even though Blender retained them. Restoring the exact col/power fields recovers the authored multicolor stripe pattern while preserving exact geometry. Residual per-pixel differences come from Eevee/WebGL rasterization and emission/color-management behavior, so renderer identity is not claimed.
